violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the hallway outside of kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The sneeze guard located at the steam table area was observed with tape holding it together and not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
Establishment is lacking a drain plug for the rinse compartment of the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plug. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The open air cold-hold unit was observed holding an ambient temperature of 49 DF. Cold holding units must be able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or lower. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or lower. The cover/sneeze guard for the steam table was observed in poor repair with tape holding it up. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Establishment is lacking proper drain plugs for the wash and rinse bays of the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain new drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. A paper towel dispenser is installed on the wall across the kitchen from the hand sink. The paper towel dispenser should be installed at the hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the kitchen cart and utensil storage container have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

The floors, especially in the corners and behind equipment, and piping have accumulation of soil residue, webbing, old droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a pan A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Hand-washing sink is lacking signage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the service area. Boxes of disposable lunch trays were observed stored on the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

Unnecessary items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023
